name: Resistance Band High Fly
shortDescription: A chest isolation movement where resistance bands are used to fly arms downward from above shoulder height.
instructions: Attach bands above head height and hold one handle in each hand. Stand with arms overhead in a wide position, then pull hands down and together in an arc, squeezing the chest. Return slowly to the start.
steps: Anchor resistance band above shoulder height.
Grasp handles and step forward for tension.
Start with arms raised wide, aligned with shoulders.
Pull arms downward and together in a wide arc.
Squeeze chest, then return slowly to start.
breathing: Exhale as you bring arms together, inhale as you return.
